data.title: Cresud Sociedad Announces Fourth Installment Payment for Series XLIII Notes
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Cresud Sociedad ( (CRESY) ) has issued an announcement.

Cresud Sociedad Anónima has announced the payment of the fourth installment of interest and capital amortization for its Series XLIII Variable Rate Notes, amounting to ARS 19,886,023,585, due in 2025. This payment will commence on January 17, 2025, and reflects the company’s commitment to fulfilling its financial obligations, potentially impacting its financial stability and credibility positively.

More about Cresud Sociedad

Cresud Sociedad Anónima, Comercial, Inmobiliaria, Financiera y Agropecuaria is a company based in Argentina, operating in sectors such as commercial real estate, finance, and agriculture. The firm is involved in various activities such as farming, livestock production, and financial services, focusing primarily on the Argentine market.

data.title: Atlantic Sapphire Reports Significant Growth in 2024 Harvest Volume
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Atlantic Sapphire ( (AASZF) ) has provided an update.

Atlantic Sapphire ASA reported a significant increase in its total harvest volume for 2024, reaching approximately 4,400t HOG compared to 1,545t in 2023. Operational adjustments, such as culling smaller fish and optimizing feeding capacity, have led to favorable biological development, increased harvest weight, and stable conditions, indicating a positive outlook for future operations.

More about Atlantic Sapphire

Atlantic Sapphire ASA is engaged in the aquaculture industry, focusing on land-based salmon farming, which allows for sustainable and efficient production. The company is primarily involved in producing high-quality salmon for global markets while emphasizing environmentally responsible practices.

The latest announcement is out from VERSES AI Inc ( (VRSSF) ).

VERSES AI Inc. has announced the pricing of its unit offering, which involves the sale of 12,738,854 units to AI-focused institutional investors and existing shareholders, generating approximately CDN$20 million. The net proceeds are intended to bolster the company’s financial position and support ongoing research and development, among other operational needs. This strategic move is expected to enhance VERSES AI’s liquidity and operational capabilities, potentially impacting its market positioning and stakeholder interests.

More about VERSES AI Inc

VERSES AI Inc. is a cognitive computing company that develops next-generation intelligent software systems inspired by nature. Its flagship product, Genius™, is a toolkit for developers aimed at enhancing applications with capabilities like reasoning, planning, and learning.

data.title: HM Exploration Commences Phase One Exploration at Devil’s Den and Announces Private Placement
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest announcement is out from Hm Exploration Corp. ( (TSE:HM) ).

HM Exploration Corp. has initiated its Phase One exploration program at the Devil’s Den Project in British Columbia, employing UAV drone technology for a geophysical survey to enhance understanding of copper mineralization. In addition, the company has announced a non-brokered private placement to raise $140,000 CAD to fund this exploration, with plans to renounce qualifying expenditures to flow-through share subscribers by the end of 2025.

More about Hm Exploration Corp.

HM Exploration Corp. operates in the exploration industry with a focus on geophysical exploration and prospecting, primarily targeting high-grade copper mineralization. The company is listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange and is utilizing modern UAV technology for efficient data acquisition.

data.description:

Shell (UK) ( (GB:SHEL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Shell plc has announced the purchase and cancellation of its own shares as part of a previously announced buy-back program. The transaction, conducted under the guidance of Citigroup Global Markets Limited, complies with both EU and UK regulations. This move is part of Shell’s broader strategy to manage its capital structure and return value to shareholders, potentially impacting its market position and stakeholder relationships.

More about Shell (UK)

Shell plc is a leading multinational energy company operating primarily in the oil and gas industry. The company is involved in the exploration, production, refining, and marketing of oil and natural gas, as well as the production of chemicals. Shell focuses on transitioning to renewable energy sources and reducing its carbon footprint as part of its strategic objectives.

data.title: Gold Terra Launches 2025 Drilling Program at Con Mine
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

An update from Gold Terra Resource ( (TSE:YGT) ) is now available.

Gold Terra Resource Corp. has initiated its 2025 wedge hole drilling program targeting the high-grade gold potential of the Campbell Shear at the Con Mine Option Property. The program aims to assess the gold deposits below the Robertson Shaft, utilizing a cost-effective method to explore a previously under-explored area. This exploration could potentially add significant gold ounces to the company’s future Mineral Resource Estimate, enhancing its competitive positioning in the gold mining industry.

More about Gold Terra Resource

Gold Terra Resource Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing primarily on gold exploration and development. The company is engaged in drilling programs to explore high-grade gold deposits, particularly in the Campbell Shear zone at the Con Mine Option Property, located in the Northwest Territories, Canada.

data.title: Siemens Energy Announces Changes in Voting Rights Held by BlackRock
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Siemens Energy ( (DE:ENR) ) has issued an update.

Siemens Energy AG has announced a change in voting rights, indicating that BlackRock, Inc., a major investment firm, has modified its shareholding and voting rights in the company. The change, effective from January 7, 2025, reflects a slight decrease in direct voting rights from 5.07% to 4.81%, but an increase in voting rights through instruments, totaling 5.42%. This adjustment in shareholding may influence Siemens Energy’s strategic decisions and stakeholder dynamics, considering BlackRock’s significant influence as an institutional investor.

More about Siemens Energy

Siemens Energy AG is a prominent player in the energy sector, based in Munich, Germany. The company is known for its comprehensive portfolio of energy solutions including innovative power and gas technologies, grid solutions, and services for energy efficiency and sustainability, with a market focus on advancing the energy transition globally.

data.title: Banco Santander Chile Announces Bond Placement in Local Market
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Banco Santander Chile ( (BSAC) ) has provided an update.

Banco Santander Chile announced the placement of dematerialized and bearer bonds in the local market, under the securities registry number 20220013. The bonds, part of the AA-18 series, amount to UF1,300,000 and will mature on December 1, 2026, with an average placement rate of 2.68%. This move represents a strategic financial operation aimed at enhancing the bank’s capital structure and market presence.

More about Banco Santander Chile

Banco Santander Chile operates in the financial industry, offering a wide range of banking services and products, including loans, deposits, and investment services. The bank focuses primarily on the Chilean market, providing comprehensive financial solutions to both individual and corporate clients.
